title: Concentric ring half-plane crop on mask clone (masks.ts)
goal: DECODED (T-qconcentric1 WIP 2026-07-17): Concentric's per-ring A/B phase is correct (Clone A per-ring timing.out ∈ [0.30,1.33s]; Clone B out=1.90s; evaluator's isLayerVisible fires per ring). GAP: each ring group's mask-source is a Clone Layer XX (cloneSourceId → Circle N) with a Crop { Left:900 } or Crop { Right:900 } param that CLIPS the disc to a horizontal HALF (LEFT-half or RIGHT-half sub-ring — see 'Nth right/left copy' group naming). resolveImageMaskAlpha in compositor/masks.ts rasterizes the disc geometry through its worldTransform but IGNORES the mask scenenode's own crop param — so paired L/R half-rings collapse into full discs; only ~2 rings survive visibly (baseline 13.38 dB). FIX: in resolveImageMaskAlpha (masks.ts) apply EvaluatedLayer.crop as a rectangular alpha clip on the rasterized shape BEFORE (or during) the perspective/orthographic rasterize; must also walk the mask-source clone chain and multiply per-hop crop (Clone Layer 20's Crop.Left=900 applies over the Circle 1 shape geometry it clones). Verify structurally: 6th-right/5th-right/4th-right/2nd-right/1st-right use Crop.Left=900 (right half only); 6th-left/5th-left/4th-left/1st-left use Crop.Right=900 (left half only); fractional rings 935.5/1014.1/1144.9/1150.5/811.6/802.0. REFUTED alternative: reviving dead Clone A via rehydrateConcentricRingClones regressed to 11.78 dB (−1.60) — timing.out IS the correct A→B phase, don't override. DoD: Concentric ≥14 dB, 0 real regressions on the clone family (Video_Wall, 3D_Rectangle, Combo_Spin, Clone_Spin) and group-mask family (Up-Over, Wipes__Mask, Center).
